chapter_title.ar: باب التَّعْقِيبِ بَعْدَ الصَّلَاةِ وَ الدُّعَاءِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 32 – The follow up after the Salāt and the supplication

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/174)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/174)
text: ا سَمِعْنَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ يَلْعَنُ فِي دُبُرِ كُلِّ مَكْتُوبَةٍ أَرْبَعَةً مِنَ الرِّجَالِ وَ أَرْبَعاً مِنَ النِّسَاءِ فُلَانٌ وَ فُلَانٌ وَ فُلَانٌ وَ مُعَاوِيَةُ وَ يُسَمِّيهِمْ وَ فُلَانَةُ وَ فُلَانَةُ وَ هِنْدٌ وَ أُمُّ الْحَكَمِ أُخْتُ مُعَاوِيَةَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhamad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail Bin Bazie, from Al Khaybari, from Al Husayn Bin Suweyr, and Abu Salma Al Sarraj who both said,

‘We heard Abu Abdullahasws, and heasws was sending ‘Laan’ (asking for Allahazwj’s wrath) at the end of every Prescribed (Salāt), on four from the men and four from the women. So and so, and so and so, and so and so, and Muawiya’, (and heasws named them), ‘And so and so woman, and so and so woman, and Hinda, and Umm Al-Hakam - the sister of Muawiya’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-ffusayn from Muhammad ibn Isma’il ibn Bazi‘ from al-Khaybariy from al-Husayn ibn Thuwayr and abu Salmah al-Sarraj who have said the following: “We heard abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, express condemnations against four men and four women after every obligatory Salah (prayer) naming so and so and so on and Mu‘awiyah, Hind and ‘Umm al-Hakam, sister of Mu‘awiyah.”
